name: M247 Europe SRL / M247 Ltd
description: The largest wholesale infrastructure provider for commercial VPNs; heavily utilized by NordVPN, ExpressVPN, and Surfshark.

name: Datacamp Limited (CDN77)
description: High-bandwidth global transit network frequently leased by premium privacy services including Mullvad, Proton VPN, and Nord.

name: Datacamp Limited (Alternative)
description: Secondary major routing block managed by Datacamp to expand global VPN and proxy infrastructure hosting.

name: Clouvider Limited
description: Premium hosting infrastructure in the UK, US, and EU containing netblocks dedicated exclusively to consumer VPN brands.

name: Misaka Network, Inc.
description: High-performance specialized infrastructure favored by privacy services targeting optimized routing across Asian and European internet exchanges.

name: LeaseWeb USA, Inc.
description: North American routing footprint for LeaseWeb, carrying substantial commercial proxy and anonymizer traffic.

name: Hydra Communications Ltd
description: Wholesale infrastructure host frequently mapped to commercial anonymization tools and scraping proxies.

name: Mullvad VPN AB
description: Dedicated corporate network owned and managed directly by Mullvad for their custom, bare-metal server operations.

name: Proton AG
description: Wholly-owned core network routing infrastructure managed directly by Proton for secure VPN and email transit.

name: Proton AG (Secure Core)
description: Secondary network allocation used by Proton to route localized, high-security multi-hop privacy architectures.

name: Cyberzone S.A.
description: Panama-registered network operated by Surfshark for dedicated VPN server infrastructure.

name: GSL Networks Pty LTD
description: Australia-based hosting provider heavily utilized by ExpressVPN for global server infrastructure.

name: F.N.S. Holdings Limited
description: Cyprus-registered network associated with ExpressVPN secure firewall and transit infrastructure.

name: PacketHub S.A.
description: Panama-registered network used by NordVPN for dedicated bare-metal server operations.

name: UK-2 Limited
description: UK-based hosting provider serving as a major infrastructure partner for ExpressVPN endpoints.

name: IPVanish Inc.
description: Wholly-owned network operated directly by IPVanish for consumer VPN services.

name: Strong Technology LLC
description: IPVanish parent company network carrying primary VPN transit traffic across North America.

name: Strong Technology LLC (NetProtect)
description: Secondary network allocation by IPVanish parent for DDoS-protected VPN server hosting.

name: DigitalOcean, LLC
description: Massive global cloud provider; extremely common source of self-hosted VPNs, proxies, and shadow proxies.

name: Linode / Akamai Connected Cloud
description: Major VPS provider favored by private and commercial VPN infrastructure.

name: Choopa, LLC / Vultr
description: Global infrastructure provider heavily leased by top-tier VPN brands and proxy resellers.

name: Hetzner Online GmbH
description: One of the largest European data center operators, carrying immense amounts of proxy and VPN traffic.

name: OVH SAS
description: Global hosting giant; one of the most common sources of commercial and budget proxy infrastructure.

name: ColoCrossing
description: Major budget hosting provider heavily favored by proxy resellers, scrapers, and anonymization networks.

name: Performive (Total Server Solutions)
description: Infrastructure frequently leased by top-tier consumer VPN brands for North American routing.

name: QuadraNet Enterprises LLC
description: Common VPN and proxy infrastructure provider in North America.

name: Tzulo, Inc.
description: US-based network with very high concentrations of scraping proxies and anonymized traffic.

name: Psychz Networks
description: Dedicated server provider often utilized for high-bandwidth proxy node hosting.

name: Hostinger International
description: Popular budget VPS host frequently used for self-hosted VPN endpoints.

name: Contabo GmbH
description: Budget VPS provider with massive global adoption for private VPNs and proxy relays.

name: G-Core Labs S.A.
description: Global CDN and hosting provider frequently acting as a proxy and VPN transit layer.

name: Zenlayer Inc
description: Major transit and hosting provider for VPNs focused on circumventing Asian internet restrictions.
